description: Designed for everyday wear, Metamostro shoes from puma embody excitement and energy for life. The outsoles with horizontal grips make these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it perfect for urban wear.UpperBlack leather upper with black liningThis slip-on sneaker consists of puma&rsquo s signature side stripe in black on one sideThe closure is a zig zag velcro strapBrand name appliqued on the strap as well as on the back of the collarMidsoleCushioned midsole for comfort and stabilityOutsoleRubber outsole with an upraised heel for enhanced tractionEmbedded Puma Jumping cat embedded on the rubber outsoleshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
